description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named basic test that runs on push to any tag and branch master, and on pull requests to branches master and feature-2.0. The workflow consists of two ubuntu-latest jobs: simple-checks and test. The simple-checks job checks out the code, sets up Python 3.8, caches pip dependencies, and runs pre-commit checks. The test job depends on simple-checks, uses a matrix strategy to run tests with different tox environments and configurations, and caches tox and pip dependencies.
